summary: Classified the PR inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was selected. Open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer/review follow-up; #90958 is already closed as superseded by the hydrated Docker fix path; #90961 is quarantined to central security handling because the artifact marks it security-sensitive.
